meaning: You must come to a complete stop at a stop sign. Stop at the white limit line or before entering the crosswalk or intersection.
meaningZh: 你必须在停车标志处完全停车。在白色停止线处停车，或在进入人行横道或路口之前停车。
actionRequired: Come to a complete stop, yield to all vehicles and pedestrians, then proceed when safe.
actionRequiredZh: 完全停车，让行所有车辆和行人，然后在安全时继续前进。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 45, Section: Regulatory Signs

meaning: A yield sign indicates that you must slow down and give the right-of-way to traffic in the intersection or roadway you are entering.
meaningZh: 让行标志表示你必须减速，并将路权让给路口或你即将进入的道路上的车辆。
actionRequired: Slow down, check for traffic, and yield the right-of-way to vehicles and pedestrians. Stop if necessary.
actionRequiredZh: 减速，检查交通状况，并将路权让给车辆和行人。必要时停车。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 46, Section: Regulatory Signs

meaning: Indicates the maximum safe speed limit under ideal conditions. You may need to drive slower in poor weather or traffic conditions.
meaningZh: 表示在理想条件下的最高安全车速限制。在恶劣天气或交通状况下，你可能需要以更慢的速度行驶。
actionRequired: Do not exceed the posted speed limit. Adjust your speed based on road, weather, and traffic conditions.
actionRequiredZh: 不要超过标示的速度限制。根据道路、天气和交通状况调整你的速度。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 48, Section: Speed Limits

meaning: Warns that there is a pedestrian crossing ahead. Be prepared to slow down or stop for pedestrians.
meaningZh: 警告前方有行人穿越道。准备减速或为行人停车。
actionRequired: Slow down and watch for pedestrians crossing or preparing to cross the road.
actionRequiredZh: 减速并注意正在过马路或准备过马路的行人。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 52, Section: Warning Signs

meaning: Indicates a school zone ahead. Speed limits are reduced during school hours, and children may be present.
meaningZh: 表示前方是学校区域。学校上课时间速度限制降低，可能有儿童出现。
actionRequired: Reduce speed to the posted school zone speed limit. Watch for children crossing and follow crossing guard directions.
actionRequiredZh: 将速度降至标示的学校区域速度限制。注意过马路的儿童，并遵循交通指挥人员的指示。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 54, Section: School Zones

meaning: Warns of a railroad crossing ahead. Always look and listen for trains before crossing.
meaningZh: 警告前方有铁路道口。过道口前务必观察和聆听是否有火车。
actionRequired: Slow down, look both ways for trains, and be prepared to stop. Never stop on the tracks.
actionRequiredZh: 减速，向两边观察是否有火车，并准备停车。绝不要在轨道上停车。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 56, Section: Railroad Crossings

meaning: Provides information about upcoming highway exits, including exit number and destination.
meaningZh: 提供即将到来的高速公路出口信息，包括出口编号和目的地。
actionRequired: Read the sign early and position your vehicle in the appropriate lane if you need to exit.
actionRequiredZh: 提前阅读标志，如果需要出口，请将车辆定位在适当的车道。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 58, Section: Guide Signs

meaning: Indicates construction or maintenance work ahead. Workers and equipment may be present.
meaningZh: 表示前方有施工或维护工作。可能有工人和设备。
actionRequired: Slow down, watch for workers and equipment, follow temporary signs, and be prepared for changed traffic patterns.
actionRequiredZh: 减速，注意工人和设备，遵循临时标志，并准备应对改变的交通模式。
dmvManualReference: California Driver Handbook 2026, Page 60, Section: Construction Signs
